description: As an ITSM Administrator, align Snipe-IT's status tracking with ITIL standards by creating four new status labels and updating specific asset records. Create the following labels: 'ITSM - Awaiting Build' (Status Type: Pending), 'ITSM - Vendor Repair' (Status Type: Undeployable), 'ITSM - Security Review' (Status Type: Undeployable), and 'ITSM - Disposed' (Status Type: Archived). Reassign assets to these new labels based on the following criteria: assets at the 'Build Room' location to 'ITSM - Awaiting Build'; assets associated with the supplier 'TechFix Partners' to 'ITSM - Vendor Repair'; assets containing the exact phrase 'Security Hold' in their notes to 'ITSM - Security Review'; and assets containing the exact phrase 'Disposal Approved' in their notes to 'ITSM - Disposed'.
